title: Enhance Calibration Diagnostic Modes
description:
# Enhance Calibration Diagnostic Modes

## 📝 User Story / Description
The current Calibration Signal sweeps too fast to visually track high-frequency rendering accuracy on the VFD. Also, coupling the sweep with a pulsing beat makes it difficult to tune peak decay vs beat sensitivity independently. 
The user requires three distinct diagnostic modes: Slow Sweep (20Hz-22kHz over 15s), Deep Bass Pulse (40Hz @ 120BPM), and Pink Noise (full spectrum static).

## ✅ Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] A dropdown menu allows selection of `off`, `sweep`, `beat`, and `noise` modes.
- [ ] Sweep mode sweeps from 20Hz to 22,000Hz over 15 seconds.
- [ ] Beat mode generates 40Hz with aggressive 500ms volume envelopes.
- [ ] Noise mode generates an `AudioBuffer` of pink noise.

## 🛠️ Technical Notes
- Replace `#testSignalToggle` with `#testSignalSelect` in `index.html`.
- Modify `state.testMode` to accept string.
- Modify `toggleCalibrationMode(mode: string)` in `audio.ts` to switch behaviors using standard `window.setInterval` and Web Audio nodes.

## 🛡️ Rigor & Verification Boundary
- [ ] Each option in the diagnostic dropdown isolates a specific audio profile without crashing.

- **Quality Debt Exemptions:**
  - `complexity_limit: false`
  - `doc_drift: false`
  - `dry_candidate: false`
